title: carex bilateralis
intro: Carex bilateralis, also known as the sweet grass or buffalo grass, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the Carex genus and is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Carex bilateralis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Carex bilateralis can be prepared into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, and is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
